title: ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SANDY HEALTH CENTER ADULT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Referral and coordination of adult outpatient services through Intensive Care Coordination. Adult outpatient services work with adults presenting with mood disorders, anxiety, and trauma-related issues. Services include individual, couples, family, and group therapy that focuses on wellness recovery, solution-focused plans, cognitive and dialectical issues, and post-traumatic stress disorder (PTSD). 39740 Pleasant Street Sandy, OR 97055 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Thursday 7:30am-6:00pm, Friday 7am-5:30pm (503) 742-5335 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 742-5335 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and some private insurance. State General Fund for individuals who are uninsured. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Clackamas County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Friday 8am-5pm, Wednesday-Thursday 8am-7pm Services: Community Mental Health Agencies Conjoint Counseling Family Counseling Group Counseling Individual Counseling Mental Health Evaluation Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND ADOLESCENT MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES OUTPATIENT HEALTH FACILITIES - PRIMARY CARE SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
